response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed on-screen text: Detected song title "愛言葉IV", artist "DECO*27" (as lyricist/composer), and the event name "Reversible" (風真いろは生誕LIVE 2025). 
2. Identified the performer in the video as VTuber Kazama Iroha.
3. Formulated search query: "愛言葉IV" "DECO*27" Japanese and English lyrics.
4. Performed web search and found the song lyrics on Genius.
5. Mapped the video structure: The video begins with an intro/event title screen (00:00-03:14) followed by the vocal performance of "愛言葉IV" (03:14-05:03).
6. Structured the final JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory segment for the "Reversible" live event, followed by a live performance of the song "愛言葉IV" (Ai Kotoba IV) by the VTuber Kazama Iroha, originally produced by DECO*27.

scenes.description: Introductory screen showing "Reversible" and event details.
VTuber Kazama Iroha performs the song "愛言葉IV".
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
想像なんてしてなかった現状 君もそう思った？
“最高”で止まらないように更新したい
叶えたい夢まであとどれくらい？
誰も行ったことがない場所へ
たどり着くまでは“僕ら止まれない”
たぶんしんどいけど、どうかよろしくね
ねえねえ たまにメーデー
僕だけじゃ作れないモノ
僕とか君とかあたしとか
恋とか愛とかまとめて全部
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A situation I wouldn't have imagined, did you feel the same?
I want to update it so it doesn't stop at "the best"
How much longer until the dream I want to fulfill?
To a place nobody has ever been to
Until we reach it, "we can't stop"
It might be tough, but please take care of me
Hey, hey, sometimes a mayday
Things I can't create on my own
Like me, and you, and I
Like love and affection, put it all together
